title: LPG Shortage Live: LPG supply concerns grow in India as US-Iran war pushes crude oil above $100
description: LPG Shortage Live: On the 13th day of the war between Iran and Israel, oil prices surged as Brent crude rose above $100 a barrel early Thursday, days after briefly nearing $120, amid worsening supply concerns following Iranian attacks on commercial shipping near the Strait of Hormuz.
